'''yayungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygophilia|pygophilia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygophilia|pygophilia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yayungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || yæyingith || yæyingij || yæyingish || yæyingi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || yayuyunguth || yayuyunguj || yayuyungush || yayuyungu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || yayunguth || yayunguj || yayungush || yayungu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || yayufngufth || yayufngufj || yayufngufsh || yayufnguf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || yayunguthu || yayunguju || yayungushu || yayunguku
|-
| [[Patient]] || yayunguth || yayunguj || yayungush || yayungu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || yayunguthul || yayungujul || yayungushul || yayungukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || yayunguuthuthu || yayunguujuju || yayunguushushu || yayunguuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || yayunguthun || yayungujun || yayungushun || yayungukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || yayunguthuoro || yayungujuoro || yayungushuoro || yayungukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
